coverage: 100% of the reachable node types across the 46-group, 828-node closure.
validation: The browser reproduces the relative three-object structure, welded quad-sphere seed, repeated tight-wrap/dual-mesh deformation, and finalized boolean shell. Structure-preview topology is exact at 8,040 / 9,300, and the authored stochastic bubble layout is 10,272 / 20,480. Blender's BMesh-style Ico Sphere grid now matches the pre-noise surface within 0.000004, the procedural noise and nearest-surface mix match Blender's rounded bounds, all 10,272 Geometry Proximity distances are bit-exact, and tight-wrap plus dynamic-triangulation bounds/topology are exact. Batching the authored duplicate multi-input cutters removes the invalid pairwise-fold explosion: the finalized browser shell is now 3,603 vertices / 2,480 reconstructed polygons (7,278 triangles) versus Blender's 3,302 vertices / 4,675 polygons (6,608 triangles). The remaining 0.0359 bounds difference begins in the final CSG solver's coincident-surface semantics. Missing Budokan and Avenir fonts belong to auxiliary label graphs and are not required by the putty surface.
